title: derris gamblei
intro: Derris gamblei, also known as the Indian derris or Derris indica, is a perennial plant in the pea family, native to tropical Asia. The plant contains rotenone, a toxic compound that has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Derris gamblei include its ability to treat fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce blood sugar levels and act as an anti-cancer agent. The plant can be prepared as an herbal remedy through the extraction of its root and leaves, which can be made into teas, infusions, or dried for later use.
